name: Total Recall
description: Recalls detailed information from memory. When I.S.P. is exhausted mid-use, recall quality is resolved on a percentile table.

resolutionTable.label: Recall quality when I.S.P. is exhausted

entries.label: Poor
entries.effect: Only vague impressions and disconnected fragments.

entries.label: Fair
entries.effect: Most major details recalled with some gaps.

entries.label: Excellent
entries.effect: Near-perfect recall of the targeted memory.
